title: Contract
description: An on-chain smart contract found at this node's resolved address.

schema.description: URI pointing to the contract schema

description.description: Short description of the contract purpose

avatar.description: URI pointing to the contract's or owner's avatar

license.description: Official software license identifier for the source code

docs.description: Primary documentation URL for developers and users

compiled-metadata.description: URI pointing to a contract metadata file as generated by a Solidity or Vyper compiler

audits.description: Third-party audit reports (URI or inline data
